feedItems.description: allocated £56.7m to Children's Social Care (≈£221 per resident)
allocated £80.8m to Adult Social Care (≈£315 per resident)
allocated £29.8m to Environment & Streets (≈£116 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £103 (4.8%) to £2258
